name: Development Toolkit
description: Essential prompts for software development, debugging, and code documentation

prompts.title: Code Review Assistant
prompts.description: Comprehensive code review focusing on best practices and improvements
prompts.content:
Please review this {{language}} code and provide feedback:

```{{language}}
{{code}}
```

Focus on:
- Code quality and readability
- Performance optimizations
- Security considerations
- Best practices adherence
- Potential bugs or edge cases
- Maintainability improvements

Provide specific suggestions with explanations and example improvements where applicable.

prompts.title: API Documentation Generator
Debugging Assistant
prompts.description: Help troubleshoot code issues and find bugs

variables.name: problem
variables.example: Function returns undefined instead of expected value

variables.name: error_message
variables.example: TypeError: Cannot read property 'length' of undefined

variables.name: expected_behavior
variables.example: Should return an array of user objects

prompts.title: Unit Test Generator
prompts.description: Generate comprehensive unit tests for functions

variables.name: function_code
variables.example: function add(a, b) { return a + b; }

variables.name: function_purpose
variables.description: What the function is supposed to do
variables.example: Adds two numbers and returns the result

prompts.title: System Architecture Reviewer
prompts.description: Review and provide feedback on system architecture designs

variables.name: project_type
variables.example: E-commerce platform, mobile app, microservices API

variables.name: architecture
variables.example: React frontend, Node.js API, PostgreSQL database, Redis cache

variables.name: constraints
variables.example: 6 month timeline, $50K budget, existing team skills
